summary: Created a 4-phase implementation plan for task 791. Fixes two compounding bugs: (A) stale provides.hooks allow-list in the core manifest that silently drops the wezterm status-hook scripts during Load Core / Load Extension copy, and (B) the settings.json registration-merge gap where reinject_loaded_extensions is state-gated and never runs for Load-Core-only repos. Plan reconciles provides.hooks in both .claude and .opencode trees (full reconciliation revealed 4 missing files, not 2 -- including claude-stop-notify.sh which the new Stop fragment references), adds a merge_targets.settings fragment targeting the committed .claude/settings.json (not .local), patches reinject_loaded_extensions to always include core, and verifies end-to-end against a throwaway BimodalLogic copy including idempotency.

artifacts.summary: Phased plan (4 phases, ~3h, waves [[1,3],[2],[4]]) to reconcile core manifest provides.hooks in both synced trees, add settings-hooks.json merge fragment + merge_targets.settings on .claude/settings.json, patch reinject_loaded_extensions to always include core, and verify script-copy + registration + idempotency against a throwaway BimodalLogic copy.

next_action_hint: Run /implement 791 to execute the plan. Phase 1 and Phase 3 are independent (Wave 1) and can run in parallel; Phase 2 depends on Phase 1; Phase 4 (verification) depends on 1, 2, 3.
